scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:api && bun run build:web
scripts.test: bun --filter @care-desk/shared test && bun --filter @care-desk/api test && bun --filter @care-desk/web test
scripts.typecheck: bun --filter @care-desk/shared typecheck && bun --filter @care-desk/api typecheck && bun --filter @care-desk/web typecheck
